headline: A Look At PACCAR (PCAR) Valuation As Recent Trading Puts The Stock Back In Focus
summary: Why PACCAR Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Today PACCAR (PCAR) is drawing fresh attention after recent trading, with the shares last closing at US$115.63 and mixed returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months prompting closer scrutiny of the truck maker’s fundamentals. See our latest analysis for PACCAR. The recent 1 day share price return of 0.25% comes after a softer patch, with a 30 day share price return of 8.95% and a year to date gain of 3.65%. Longer term total shareholder returns...
